Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Silverlords]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Silverlords gather armies from the worlds they conquer.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — Silverlords are platinum-crowned men and women who coordinate synchronized bombardments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — Silverlords are elites and powerful figures even by the standards of Judges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — A saying among Judges is that there are always more Silverlords.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Silverlords can use silver crowns and serpentine runes to call on energy systems of plundered worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Silverlords tear open portals into the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Some Silverlords had served a term in Haven before.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Silverlords are longtime partners to the Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Silverlords were opposing Suriel.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Silverlords delivered two prisoners to the Mad King's group in the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Markuth's techniques are the ones he would use against Silverlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — A Silverlord is a powerful being that cannot be fought.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Jek’nan feels more like a Silverlord than an Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Silverlords are holding Threshold for ransom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — There is currently one Silverlord holding Threshold with at least a dozen more in reserve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper may intend to bargain with the Silverlord for the release of Threshold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Silverlord is a woman crowned in a silver halo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Silverlord was struck by black fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Silverlord is considered expendable by other Silverlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — There are fifteen Silverlords concentrated near Lindon in Threshold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Silverlord is a raven.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
